pi_items.source: export_result.sh:11 and setup_task.sh:30 - consistent file path for output GeoPackage
setup_task.sh:10, setup_qgis.sh:89 - consistent GeoJSON file path containing sample points
setup_qgis.sh:95 and setup_task.sh:20 - Point A coordinates match exactly
setup_qgis.sh:96 and setup_task.sh:21 - Point B coordinates match exactly
setup_qgis.sh:97 and setup_task.sh:22 - Point C coordinates match exactly
verifier.py:34 uses 1e-5 as default tolerance; metadata value matches. Tolerance is reasonable for decimal degree precision (~1m at equator)

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a single LineString feature in a GeoPackage file at /home/ga/GIS_Data/power_line.gpkg by digitizing a route through three synthetic sample points (Point A at [-122.4, 37.6], Point B at [-122.3, 37.7], and Point C at [-122.1, 37.65]) loaded from /home/ga/GIS_Data/sample_points.geojson. The snapping tolerance is 0.00001 degrees (1e-5). All expected vertices are synthetically generated within setup scripts with consistent values across multiple files.
